headline: Boston Beer vs Molson Coors: One Bets on Innovation, the Other Is Just Surviving
summary: Boston Beer (NYSE: SAM) or Molson Coors Brewing (NYSE: TAP)—which one belongs in a retirement portfolio right now? The two have taken sharply divergent paths in 2026. Boston Beer is up 17.8% year-to-date while Molson Coors has shed 7.0%. That gap reflects a fundamental difference in trajectory that retirement investors need to understand before reaching ... Boston Beer vs Molson Coors: One Bets on Innovation, the Other Is Just Surviving
